steps.title: Require the actual juxtaposition
steps.content: A specific example of irrational juxtaposition must name the disparate images placed together in the collage. The notes list a young couple, a leaf boat, and a vast celestial space in Rivera's Vagabonds.

steps.title: Reject abstract descriptions
steps.content: B misuses the quotation and omits the images, C names the concept without the specific elements, and D only identifies the work as surrealist collage. The specific list of images in the work is needed because it makes the example concrete rather than merely conceptual. The answer is A.
